ReleaseNotes:
🎉 Version 1.1.3

✨ New Features:
• Automatic update system with smart notifications
• Enhanced pipe calculation performance (30% faster)
• New conflict detection tool for MEP systems
• Advanced export options with detailed reports
• Dark mode UI improvements

🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Fixed memory leak in large projects
• Resolved multi-view synchronization issues
• Corrected material calculation accuracy
• Fixed display issues in 4K monitors

🚀 Improvements:
• Reduced memory footprint by 25%
• Updated MEP component library
• Better error messages and logging
• Improved startup performance
